title: carex gracilis subsp. broteroana
intro: Carex gracilis subsp. broteroana, also known as Carex broteroana, is a subspecies of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae, typically found in wetlands and along streams. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Carex gracilis subsp. broteroana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
